welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.title: Villa Sera
welcome.subtitle: Where luxury meets the Sea of Cortés
welcome.description: Perched on the cliffs of Los Cabos, Villa Sera is a private luxury residence with direct views of the Sea of Cortés and access to a private beach. An experience crafted for the most discerning guests.

services.label: Add-On Services
services.title: Elevate your stay to the next level
services.subtitle: Optional services available to make your visit even more exceptional. Each one is arranged separately based on your preferences.

chef.title: Private Chef
chef.description: Personalized menus with the freshest local ingredients. Gourmet breakfasts, dinners under the stars and curated wine pairings.

butler.title: Butler Service
butler.description: Discreet and personalized 24-hour service. Every request attended to before you even make it.

yacht.title: Private Yachts
yacht.description: Private tours to the Cabo Arch, snorkeling in crystal-clear waters, sport fishing and sunsets from the sea.

massage.title: Massage & Spa
massage.description: Certified therapists in the comfort of the villa. Relaxing massages, facial treatments and wellness rituals.

activities.title: Activities
activities.description: Paddleboard, kayak, ATV, whale watching, golf and guided excursions throughout Los Cabos.

concierge.title: Concierge
concierge.description: Reservations at the finest restaurants, luxury transportation, private jets and access to exclusive events.

gallery.label: The Villa
gallery.title: Discover every space
gallery.subtitle: Mexican colonial architecture with breathtaking views

chef.title: Private Dinner Under the Stars
chef.description: Your private chef designs an exclusive menu for the occasion. Villa Sera's terrace, with El Arco in the background and the Sea of Cortés as your backdrop, becomes the most exclusive restaurant in Los Cabos.

yacht.title: Private Yacht Charter
yacht.description: Set sail from the villa's private beach into the waters of the Sea of Cortés. Snorkeling, sport fishing, whale shark diving and sunsets before the iconic Arch of Cabo San Lucas.

wellness.title: In-Villa Wellness
wellness.description: Our certified therapists bring the spa to you. Massages on the ocean-view terrace, aromatherapy rituals and sunrise meditation to the sound of the waves.

items.quote: An absolutely magical experience. The villa is stunning, the views are incredible and the staff made us feel like royalty. We will definitely be back.
items.author: Sarah M.

items.quote: The private chef was the highlight of our trip. Every meal was a work of art. The oceanfront location is simply unmatched anywhere in Los Cabos.
items.author: Carlos & Ana

items.quote: We celebrated our anniversary here and it was perfect in every way. The sunset yacht tour to the Arch was something we will never forget.
items.author: James & Linda K.

contact.label: Reservations
contact.title: Reserve your stay
contact.subtitle: Contact us directly for availability and personalized rates.

footer.tagline: An unrivaled private experience in Los Cabos
